message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 租户创建流程

participant "starter-admin(超管平台服务)" as admin
participant "starter-auth(权限中心)" as auth
database "auth数据库" as db
queue "NSQ" as nsq
participant "其他业务中台服务" as other_services

admin -> auth : 创建租户接口
activate auth
auth -> db : 生成租户密钥，向数据库保存租户信息
activate db
db --> auth : 返回新增的租户ID
deactivate db
auth -x> nsq : 异步通知其他业务中台服务，进行租户初始化
nsq -x> other_services : 异步通知，租户初始化
other_services -x> auth : 异步通知，租户初始化
auth -> db : 创建租户下级的相关表，如：用户表，角色表
deactivate db
auth --> admin : 响应：租户ID及密钥信息
deactivate auth

@enduml
```
